```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-left:4px solid #2C8475;border-radius:0 12px 12px 0;padding:0.7em 1em;text-align:left;margin-bottom:1.1em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(44,132,117,0.08);">
  <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.2em;">recap · part 01</div>
  <div style="font-size:0.65em;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.45;">
   You built a website, then turned it into a <strong style="color:#2C8475;">skill</strong>. Today we zoom into that one box.
  </div>
 </div>

 <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0.85em;">

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;opacity:0.5;">
   <div style="width:3em;height:3em;border-radius:0.9em;background:#F3E5F5;border:1.5px solid #E1BEE7;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#7B2CBF;"><i data-lucide="cpu" style="width:1.3em;height:1.3em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.72em;font-weight:700;color:#7B2CBF;">Model</div>
  </div>

  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1.2em;font-weight:300;color:#C7C1E5;">+</span>

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;">
   <div style="width:3.7em;height:3.7em;border-radius:1em;background:#E8F5E9;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C8475;box-shadow:0 10px 26px rgba(44,132,117,0.3);border:2px solid #2C8475;"><i data-lucide="sparkles" style="width:1.6em;height:1.6em;stroke-width:1.9;"></i></div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.9em;font-weight:800;color:#2C8475;">Skills</div>
  </div>

  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1.2em;font-weight:300;color:#C7C1E5;">+</span>

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;opacity:0.5;">
   <div style="width:3em;height:3em;border-radius:0.9em;background:#FEF5E7;border:1.5px solid #FAE9C8;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#C4881A;"><i data-lucide="files" style="width:1.3em;height:1.3em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.72em;font-weight:700;color:#C4881A;">Files</div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
